rules.rule_text:
title: Cisco IOS XE Backdoor CVE-2023-20198
id: 6adf34c1-750b-4024-8737-896ad08f50b2
description: Actors have exploited CVE-2023-20198 to deploy a backdoor in the Cisco
  IOS XE web interface
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: '2023-10-18'
references:
- https://blog.talosintelligence.com/active-exploitation-of-cisco-ios-xe-software/
- https://sec.cloudapps.cisco.com/security/center/content/CiscoSecurityAdvisory/cisco-sa-iosxe-webui-privesc-j22SaA4z
- https://twitter.com/leak_ix/sc-status/1714342183141028307
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    cs-method: POST
    c-uri: /webui/logoutconfirm.html
    c-uri-query|startswith: logon_hash=
  filter:
    c-uri-query: logon_hash=1
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Request '/webui/logoutconfirm.html?logon_hash=1' and see if the response body is
  a hex string. If not, it's likely a false positive
level: high
tags:
- attack.initial_access
